result: data/output/cleaned_data.csv - Successfully created with 16111 rows and 2 variables (NSID, eth). The script loaded 5 tab-delimited files from data/input/, harmonized ethnicity variables across all waves (ages 14, 15, 17, 32), converted wave-specific missing value codes to standard codes (-9=Refused, -8=Don't know/insufficient information, -1=Not applicable, -3=Not asked/interviewed), prioritized earliest valid responses for the time-invariant characteristic of ethnicity, created factor variables with labels, and output the cleaned data to data/output/cleaned_data.csv.
